about_desc: This screen will show your project idea and team details.
history_desc: This screen will show previous advisory results.
welcome_subtitle: Empowering farmers with smart crop, irrigation and disease guidance.
crop_recommendation_sub: Enter your farm details to get the best crop suggestion.
season_question: Which season are you asking for?
demand_crop: Most in-demand crop in your area
fill_all_fields: Please fill all the input fields.
crop_reason_rice: Kharif season with strong water availability and fertile soil is suitable for rice.
crop_reason_wheat: Rabi season with decent irrigation and fertile soil supports wheat cultivation well.
crop_reason_millet: Low water conditions and lighter soils are better suited for low-water crops like millet.
crop_reason_vegetables: Smaller land with manageable irrigation can be more profitable with vegetables.
crop_reason_soybean: Soybean demand in your area makes it a practical and market-friendly option.
crop_reason_general: Based on your farm conditions and local market demand, this crop looks suitable.
disease_detection_sub: Upload a crop image and describe the issue for better disease detection.
gallery_permission: Please allow access to gallery to upload leaf image.
disease_missing_input: Please upload an image, enter crop name, and describe the problem.
problem_placeholder: e.g. Leaves are turning yellow and have brown spots
disease_solution: Use a copper-based fungicide and avoid overhead watering. Remove infected leaves if possible.
irrigation_sub: Enter your farm details for smart irrigation guidance
